base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_level_indicator — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 legend of zelda. 'LEVEL 1' through 'LEVEL 9' indicators — shown at top of dungeon pause menu. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'LEVEL 1' through 'LEVEL 9' indicators — shown at top of dungeon pause menu
